parsed.recommendation_text: The Acer Swift Go 14 is the best value for budget-conscious buyers seeking a professional-grade laptop. At $699, it offers an IPS display, lightweight design, and decent performance suitable for documents, spreadsheets, and web browsing. While its Intel Core Ultra 5 processor is less powerful than competitors' Core Ultra 7 or Ryzen 7 chips, the Swift Go remains a solid choice within your budget constraints.
parsed.selection_rationale: Balances price with adequate performance and features.
